subcodes.first_line: The Divine Word, which in one station is interpreted as the Most Pure Wine, was sent forth time after time, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلمه الهیه که برحیق اطهر در مقامی تعبیر میشود مره بعد مره ارسال شد ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
